4.anchor: And when Christ, who is your

6.anchor: Because of these sins, the anger of God is coming.
6.note: Some manuscripts read is coming on all who disobey him.

11.anchor: In this new life, it doesn’t matter if you are a Jew or a Gentile,

24.anchor: Remember that the Lord will give you an inheritance as your reward, and that the Master you are serving is Christ.
24.note: Or and serve Christ as your Master.

8.anchor: Don’t let anyone capture you with empty philosophies and high-sounding nonsense that come from human thinking and from the spiritual powers

9.anchor: For in Christ lives all the fullness of God in a human body.
9.note: Or in him dwells all the completeness of the Godhead bodily.

11.anchor: When you came to Christ, you were “circumcised,” but not by a physical procedure. Christ performed a spiritual circumcision—the cutting away of your sinful nature.
11.note: Greek the cutting away of the body of the flesh.

18.anchor: Don’t let anyone condemn you by insisting on pious self-denial or the worship of angels,

2.anchor: We are writing to God’s holy people in the city of Colosse, who are faithful brothers and sisters

7.anchor: You learned about the Good News from Epaphras, our beloved co-worker. He is Christ’s faithful servant, and he is helping us on your behalf.
7.note: Or he is ministering on your behalf; he is ministering on our behalf.

11.anchor: We also pray that you will be strengthened with all his glorious power so you will have all the endurance and patience you need. May you be filled with joy,
11.note: Or all the patience and endurance you need with joy.

14.note: Some manuscripts add with his blood.

15.anchor: He existed before anything was created and is supreme over all creation,
15.note: Or He is the firstborn of all creation.

18.anchor: supreme over all who rise from the dead.
18.note: Or the firstborn from the dead.

28.anchor: So we tell others about Christ, warning everyone and teaching everyone with all the wisdom God has given us. We want to present them to God, perfect

6.anchor: Let your conversation be gracious and attractive

15.anchor: Please give my greetings to our brothers and sisters
